title: polypodium rotundatum
intro: Polypodium rotundatum, also known as Indian fern or Himalayan polypody, is a type of plant that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family and is native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The medicinal properties of Polypodium rotundatum include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Polypodium rotundatum is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
